_README: The real config lives at Jobs/.discord_webhooks.json locally and /var/www/pei-jobs/.discord_webhooks.json on the server. Structure: one Discord SERVER per job — top-level keys are job names (plus 'Company' for the company-wide server), each holding channel->webhook-URL pairs. Create one webhook per channel in Discord: open the channel -> Edit Channel -> Integrations -> Webhooks -> New Webhook -> Copy Webhook URL. Leave a value as "" (or omit the channel) to keep it disabled for that job. After editing, run upload_webhooks.bat to push it to the server.
